idea-plugin.name: macOS Vibrancy
idea-plugin.description:
Adds native macOS vibrancy (frosted glass) transparency to the IntelliJ IDE window using AppKit's NSVisualEffectView.

Features

  • 7 built-in vibrancy themes (dark, light, glass, noir, and more)
  • Custom mode with configurable material, intensity, and appearance
  • Liquid Glass support on macOS Tahoe (26+)
  • Live preview — changes apply instantly from Settings

Usage

Go to Settings → Appearance → Vibrancy to choose a theme or configure custom settings.

macOS only. Requires IntelliJ IDEA 2024.3 or later.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • 7 built-in vibrancy themes with live preview
  • Custom mode: material, intensity, and appearance controls
  • Liquid Glass support for macOS Tahoe
